text: I am feeling very strong and healthy, the baby is kicking.
description: Healthy patient with normal fetal movement

text: I feel tired but I can still do my daily work.
Sometimes I vomit in the morning, but I am able to eat later.
I have no pain or discomfort at all today.
My stomach hurts a little bit on the sides when I stand up.
It hurts when I urinate and I have to go very frequently.
I have a mild fever and feeling chilly.
My feet are slightly swollen after standing for a long time.
I have a slight headache and feel warm.
description: Mild headache with warmth warning sign

text: I feel general body weakness and a burning sensation when peeing.
I am bleeding from my vagina, it started an hour ago.
I have not felt my baby move since yesterday morning.
description: Severe danger sign (Absence of fetal movements)

text: My head is pounding severely and my vision is blurred, I see spots.
My face and hands became very swollen suddenly today.
I have severe abdominal pain and I am bleeding.
description: Severe danger sign (Placental issues / miscarriage risk)
